title: GovernancePolicy
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 19b.2 (added by canon 0.4.0, ADR-018). Owned by governance-service (epd2_governance_service.domain.GovernancePolicy). approved_by_role_id is non-nullable (canon: 'не nullable') - both the proposer and the designated approver are recorded from proposal time, and activate_governance_policy re-validates both are still active/in-scope/distinct at activation. Status draft -> active (requires approved_by_role_id distinct from proposed_by_role_id, ADR-020 item 1) -> superseded (only when a new version activates for the same policy_type - never a standalone command). At most one active policy per policy_type at a time; version is monotonic per policy_type.
